description: Toon top-down 4-direction RPG character, advanced move set: slash-down, slash-up, slash-right, slash-left, cast-down, hurt, death.

states.name: slash-down
states.action: Facing-down melee slash: windup, strike, and follow-through through pose and an attached weapon effect only, viewed from the front. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Character faces straight down (toward the viewer) in every frame.
Any weapon trail or impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached slash arcs, floating impact stars, or motion lines outside the silhouette.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: slash-up
states.action: Facing-up melee slash: windup, strike, and follow-through through pose and an attached weapon effect only, viewed from behind. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Character faces straight up (away from the viewer, back visible) in every frame.
Any weapon trail or impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached slash arcs, floating impact stars, or motion lines outside the silhouette.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: slash-right
states.action: Rightward melee slash: windup, strike, and follow-through through pose and an attached weapon effect only, viewed from the side. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face right, viewed from the side.
Any weapon trail or impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached slash arcs, floating impact stars, or motion lines outside the silhouette.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: slash-left
states.action: Leftward melee slash: windup, strike, and follow-through through pose and an attached weapon effect only, viewed from the side. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face left, viewed from the side.
Any weapon trail or impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached slash arcs, floating impact stars, or motion lines outside the silhouette.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: cast-down
states.action: Facing-down spellcast: raise arms or a prop, channel briefly, and release, viewed from the front. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Character faces straight down (toward the viewer) in every frame.
Any attached casting effect (e.g. a small glimmer at the hands or prop tip) must stay opaque, hard-edged, and physically overlapping the silhouette.
Do not draw detached magic circles, floating runes, particle bursts, or glow halos.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: hurt
states.action: Facing-down hit reaction: impact flinch, recoil, and recovery. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Character faces straight down (toward the viewer) in every frame.
Any attached impact flash or stars must overlap the silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached stars, floating symbols, or separate impact bursts.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: death
states.action: Facing-down death sequence: impact, stagger, collapse, and a held final defeated pose. Not a loop; the last frame is the resting end state. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Character faces straight down (toward the viewer) through the sequence.
The final frame must be a stable, held defeated pose suitable as an animation end state, not a mid-motion frame.
Do not draw detached dust clouds, floating symbols, or ground cracks outside the silhouette.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
